included_drugs.rationale: Initial MAOI portfolio for A08 mechanism-field package.

excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.name: tranylcypromine
excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.rationale: Not included in this initial A08 package without a dedicated portfolio expansion mission.

excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.name: isocarboxazid
excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.rationale: Not included in this initial A08 package without a dedicated portfolio expansion mission.

excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.name: selegiline
excluded_or_unresolved_candidates.rationale: Requires separate treatment because formulation and selectivity issues may require dedicated governance.
